economic_notes: Liidlii Kue Society is a wholly owned related party. Undaa Gogha Trust established with $552,000 in cash. LKS-Enterprises fund reports assets, liabilities, revenue and expenditure relating to investments held.
notes: Non-consolidated financial statements only; separate consolidated statements for year ended March 31, 2022 noted as having been prepared. Liidlii Kue Society is a wholly owned entity accounted for as a related party rather than consolidated. Long-term investments of $1,281,311 held at cost. Undaa Gogha Trust of $552,000 newly established in 2023. Note 3 shows cash total of $3,018,460 while balance sheet shows $3,024,223 - minor discrepancy. Contributions receivable includes several aged items from 2018/19 still outstanding. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $2,274,347 + GNWT $1,925,431 + Government of Canada $518,897 + Dehcho First Nation $898,406 + deferred revenue net adjustment (-$577,188) = approximately $5,039,893 gross government transfers recognized; alternatively computed as total revenue $6,283,152 minus OSR $1,243,259 = $5,039,893.
